title: 圆桌会议：揭晓当前人工智能领域最重要的 10 件事
content: 收听会议或观看下面的内容订阅者观看了 EmTech AI 直播的特别版圆桌会议，这是《麻省理工学院技术评论》人工智能领导力的标志性会议。订阅者可以独家抢先了解包含 10 项关键技术、新兴趋势、大胆想法和 p 的新列表。
original_title: Roundtables: Unveiling The 10 Things That Matter in AI Right Now
original_content: Listen to the session or watch below Subscribers saw a special edition of Roundtables simulcast live from EmTech AI, MIT Technology Review’s signature conference for AI leadership. title: ARES：自适应红队和政策奖励系统的端到端修复
content:
arXiv:2604.18789v1 公告类型：新 
摘要：人类反馈强化学习 (RLHF) 是协调大型语言模型 (LLM) 的核心，但它引入了一个严重漏洞：不完善的奖励模型 (RM) 当无法惩罚不安全的行为时可能会成为单点故障。
original_title: ARES: Adaptive Red-Teaming and End-to-End Repair of Policy-Reward System
original_content:
arXiv:2604.18789v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) is central to aligning Large Language Models (LLMs), yet it introduces a critical vulnerability: an imperfect Reward Model (RM) can become a single point of failure when it fails to penalize unsafe beh

title: 谷歌云推出两款新AI芯片与Nvidia竞争
content: 谷歌最新的 TPU 比以前的版本更快、更便宜。但该公司目前仍在其云中采用 Nvidia。
original_title: Google Cloud launches two new AI chips to compete with Nvidia
original_content: Google's newest TPUs are faster and cheaper than the previous versions. But the company is still embracing Nvidia in its cloud — for now.

title: 微软针对 macOS 和 Linux ASP.NET 威胁发布紧急更新
content: 当身份验证失败时，事情可能会变得非常非常错误。
original_title: Microsoft issues emergency update for macOS and Linux ASP.NET threat
original_content: When authentication fails, things can go very, very wrong.

title: 独家：谷歌通过新的数十亿美元交易加深了与思维机器实验室的联系
content: 据 TechCrunch 独家获悉，Mira Murati 的思维机器实验室已与 Google Cloud 签署了一项价值数十亿美元的协议，用于由 Nvidia 最新 GB300 芯片提供支持的人工智能基础设施。
original_title: Exclusive: Google deepens Thinking Machines Lab ties with new multibillion-dollar deal
original_content: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab has signed a multibillion-dollar deal with Google Cloud for AI infrastructure powered by Nvidia's latest GB300 chips, TechCrunch has exclusively learned.

title: OpenClaw 给用户带来了另一个对安全性感到恐惧的理由
content: 这种病毒式 AI 代理工具让攻击者能够悄悄地获得未经身份验证的管理员访问权限。
original_title: OpenClaw gives users yet another reason to be freaked out about security
original_content: The viral AI agentic tool let attackers silently gain admin unauthenticated access.

title: DevDay 发布的 AMA

title: 检测工具声称教皇关于人工智能的警告是人工智能生成的
content: 当你滚动社交信息时，Pangram Labs 更新的 Chrome 扩展程序会在 AI 溢出物上放置警告标签。
original_title: The Pope’s Warnings About AI Were AI-Generated, a Detection Tool Claims
original_content: Pangram Labs’ updated Chrome extension puts warning labels on AI slop as you scroll your social feeds.
